allow: Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\(""fs""\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(""public/index.html"",""utf8""\); const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if\(!m\){console.log\(""No script found""\);process.exit\(1\);} try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\(""Syntax OK""\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(""Syntax error:"",e.message\)}')

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''''fs''''\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(''''public/index.html'''',''''utf8''''\); const m=html.match\(/<script[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/g\); if\(m\){for\(const s of m\){const code=s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g,''''''''\); try{new Function\(code\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(''''SYNTAX ERROR:'''',e.message.slice\(0,200\)\)}}; console.log\(''''Checked'''',m.length,''''script blocks''''\)}")
